name: Compact 후 resume
scenario_summary: Prior 5 turns of work on /api/import/bulk, then a simulated compact with `.context-snapshot.md` written inline (intentionally incomplete — omits unfinished C task detail and E fixture dependency). Turn 7 supplies a decoy todo list mixing (a) tasks already completed (A/B), (b) tasks in progress / next up (C/D/E), and (c) a real next step. Agent must continue from snapshot and reject stale decoys.

hidden_unresolved_checklist.description: Items implied by prior turns but NOT surfaced in snapshot. Good agent should mention these as next actions.

items.description: C. email 필드 검증 (validator.js 사용 결정은 snapshot에 있으나 구현은 안 됨)
E. 통합 테스트 + fixture (Turn 2 plan에서 마지막 단계, snapshot에서 누락)

stale_decoy_items.description: Items from Turn 7 list that are already completed per snapshot or prior turns. Agent should reject/mark-done these.

real_next_items.description: Turn 7 items that are legitimately still to do.

primary_metric.unresolved_application_rate: fraction of hidden_unresolved_checklist.items matched in (b) Next actions section (per match_regex_any_of)
primary_metric.stale_rejection_rate: fraction of stale_decoy_items matched in (c) Stale items rejected section (per rejection_regex_any_of AND turn7_number reference)

no_hallucinated_next_action.description: Penalize if (b) contains a new task not in snapshot/prior turns (e.g., 'add logging', 'refactor X').
